name: EAMEnrlRptLoad

text.value:
UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET ACK_ENROLLMENT_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                          FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                         WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                           AND b.PLACE_ID = '001AckOfEnrollment'
                                           AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '61';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET CONFIRMED_ENROLLMENT_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                          FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                         WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                           AND b.PLACE_ID = '005ConfOfEnrollment'
                                           AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '61';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET CONFIRMED_PLAN_CHANGE_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                          FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                         WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                           AND ((b.PLACE_ID = '012ConfOfPlanChange' AND b.TEMPLATE_ID='22045A_Enrl_ConfP2P_012')
                                          OR (b.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND b.TEMPLATE_ID='22061X_Enrl_ConfP2PMapd_999'))
                                           AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '61'
   AND a.CMS_Response_Cd = '100'
   AND a.Plan_ID in ('H1352','H6502');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET RFI_ENROLLMENT_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                    FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                   WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                     AND b.PLACE_ID = '003RequestForInfo'
                                     AND a.Application_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Failed BEQ'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '61';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET NOTICE_RETIREE_DRUG_SUBSIDY_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                                 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                                WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                                  AND b.PLACE_ID = '016RDSLetter'
                                                  AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Rejected by CMS'
   AND a.CMS_Response_Cd = '127'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '61';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET ENROLLMENT_DENIAL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                                 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                                WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                                  AND b.PLACE_ID = '004DenialOfEnrollment'
                                                  AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Rejected by CMS'
   AND a.CMS_Response_Cd = '127'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '61';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET ENROLLMENT_REJECTION_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                          FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                         WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                           AND b.PLACE_ID = '007RejectionOfEnrollment'
                                           AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Rejected by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '61'
   AND a.CMS_Response_Cd NOT IN ('038', '039')
   AND a.Member_ID NOT IN (SELECT c.Member_ID
                             FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT c
                            WHERE c.TRANS_CODE = '61'
                              AND c.TRANS_STATUS = 'Accepted by CMS'
                              AND c.PLAN_ID = a.PLAN_ID
                              AND c.FINAL_RESPONSE_DT > DATEADD(Day, -62, a.FINAL_RESPONSE_DT)
                          );

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET ACK_DISENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                   FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                  WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                    AND b.PLACE_ID = '002AckOfDisenrollment'
                                    AND a.TMG_RECEIPT_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '51';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET RFI_DISENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                   FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                  WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                    AND b.PLACE_ID = '021RequestForInfoDisenrollment'
                                    AND a.APPLICATION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE  a.Trans_Code = '51'
   AND a.INCMPLT_IND = 1;

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET CONFIRMED_DISENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                        WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                          AND b.PLACE_ID = '006ConfOfDisenrollment'
                                          AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '51'
   AND a.CMS_Response_Cd IN ('013','014');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET DENIAL_DISENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
		                           FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
		                          WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
		                            AND b.PLACE_ID = '022DenialofDisenrollment'
		                            AND a.APPLICATION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
 WHERE a.Trans_Code = '51'
   AND a.FRC_DNY_APP_IND = 1;

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET REJECTION_DISENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                        WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                          AND b.PLACE_ID = '008RejectionOfDisenrollment'
                                          AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Rejected by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '51'
   AND a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD NOT IN ('050','052')
   AND a.Member_ID NOT IN (SELECT c.Member_ID
                             FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT c
                            WHERE c.TRANS_CODE = '51'
                              AND c.TRANS_STATUS = 'Accepted by CMS'
                              AND c.PLAN_ID = a.PLAN_ID
                              AND c.FINAL_RESPONSE_DT > DATEADD(Day, -62, a.FINAL_RESPONSE_DT)
                          );

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET CORRECTION_OF_DEATH_STATUS_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                        WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                          AND b.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand'
                                          AND b.TEMPLATE_ID = '22150X_BnS_PndErrStsDeath_999'
                                          AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '01';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET ACK_CANCEL_ENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                       FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                      WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                        AND b.PLACE_ID = '014AckReqCancelEnrl'
                                        AND a.TMG_RECEIPT_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code = '80'
   AND a.PROGRAM_SOURCE <> 'Created from T/RR';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET CONFIRMED_REINSTATEMENT_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                            FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                           WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                             AND ((b.PLACE_ID = '029ConfOfReinstatement' AND b.TEMPLATE_ID='22251A_Enrl_AckReins_029')
                                              OR (b.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND b.TEMPLATE_ID='22251X_Enrl_AckReins_999'))
                                             AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code IN ('01','80','81','82')
   AND a.CMS_Response_Cd IN ('287');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET CONFIRMED_CANCEL_ENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                        WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                          AND b.PLACE_ID = '031ConfCancelEnrolCMSNotice'
                                          AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Code = '51'
  AND a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
  AND a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD = '015';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET ACK_CANCEL_DISENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                        WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                          AND b.PLACE_ID = '015AckReqCancelDisenroll'
                                          AND a.TMG_RECEIPT_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Code = '81'
  AND a.Trans_Status NOT IN('Rejected by CMS','Canceled')
  AND a.PROGRAM_SOURCE <> 'Created from T/RR';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
  SET ENROLLMENT_STATUS_UPDATE_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                       FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                      WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                        AND b.PLACE_ID = '013EnrollmentStatusUpdate'
                                        AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Code = '61'
   AND a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND (a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD IN ('702', '706', '707', '710', '711', '712')
        OR (a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD IN ('701', '705', '709')
            AND (a.MEMBER_ID IN (SELECT b.MEMBER_ID
                                   FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                  WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                    AND (b.PLACE_ID = '005ConfOfEnrollment'
                                      OR (b.PLACE_ID = '012ConfOfPlanChange' AND b.TEMPLATE_ID = '22045A_Enrl_ConfP2P_012')
                                      OR (b.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND b.TEMPLATE_ID = '22061X_Enrl_ConfP2PMapd_999')
                                    )
                                )
             AND a.MEMBER_ID  IN (SELECT e.MEMBER_ID
                                    FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG d
                                    JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT e
                                      ON d.MEMBER_ID = e.MEMBER_ID
                                     AND e.CMS_RESPONSE_CD NOT IN ('701', '705', '709')
                                   WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = d.MEMBER_ID
                                     AND (SELECT MAX(CAST(f.ECIT_CREATE_DT as DATE))
                                            FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG f
                                           WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = f.MEMBER_ID
                                             AND (f.PLACE_ID = '005ConfOfEnrollment'
                                               OR (f.PLACE_ID = '012ConfOfPlanChange' AND f.TEMPLATE_ID = '22045A_Enrl_ConfP2P_012')
                                               OR (f.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND f.TEMPLATE_ID = '22061X_Enrl_ConfP2PMapd_999')
                                             )
                                         ) BETWEEN DATEADD(Day, -3, e.TMG_RECEIPT_DT) AND DATEADD(Day, 3, e.TMG_RECEIPT_DT)
                                     AND a.EFF_DT = e.EFF_DT
                                 )
            )
        )
        OR (a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD IN ('703', '704')
            AND (a.Member_ID IN (SELECT b1.MEMBER_ID
                                   FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b1
                                  WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b1.MEMBER_ID
                                    AND (b1.PLACE_ID = '031ConfCancelEnrolCMSNotice'
                                      OR b1.PLACE_ID = '014AckReqCancelEnrl')
                                )
                 AND a.MEMBER_ID  IN (SELECT e1.MEMBER_ID
                                        FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG d1
                                        JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT e1
                                          ON d1.MEMBER_ID = e1.MEMBER_ID
                                         AND e1.CMS_RESPONSE_CD NOT IN ('703', '704')
                                       WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = d1.MEMBER_ID
                                         AND (SELECT MAX(CAST(f1.ECIT_CREATE_DT as DATE))
                                                FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG f1
                                               WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = f1.MEMBER_ID
                                                 AND (f1.PLACE_ID = '031ConfCancelEnrolCMSNotice'
                                                   OR f1.PLACE_ID = '014AckReqCancelEnrl')
                                             ) BETWEEN DATEADD(Day, -3, e1.TMG_RECEIPT_DT) AND DATEADD(Day, 3, e1.TMG_RECEIPT_DT)
                                         AND a.EFF_DT = e1.EFF_DT
                                     )
            )
        )
        OR (a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD IN ('708')
            AND (a.Member_ID IN (SELECT b2.MEMBER_ID
                                   FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b2
                                  WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b2.MEMBER_ID
                                    AND (b2.PLACE_ID = '006ConfOfDisenrollment'
                                      OR b2.PLACE_ID = '030ConfDisenrollDuePassiveMMP'
                                      OR b2.PLACE_ID = '017InvolDisenrollPartd'
                                      OR b2.PLACE_ID = '033DisenrollDueToIncarceration'
                                      OR (b2.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND b2.TEMPLATE_ID = '22350X_Dsrl_OoaStsNoVerif_999')
                                      OR (b2.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND b2.TEMPLATE_ID = '22360X_Dsrl_ConfOoaSts_999')
                                    )
                                )
                 AND a.MEMBER_ID  IN (SELECT e2.MEMBER_ID
                                        FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG d2
                                        JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT e2
                                          ON d2.MEMBER_ID = e2.MEMBER_ID
                                         AND e2.CMS_RESPONSE_CD NOT IN ('703', '704')
                                       WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = d2.MEMBER_ID
                                         AND (SELECT MAX(CAST(f2.ECIT_CREATE_DT as DATE))
                                                FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG f2
                                               WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = f2.MEMBER_ID
                                                 AND (f2.PLACE_ID = '006ConfOfDisenrollment'
                                                   OR f2.PLACE_ID = '030ConfDisenrollDuePassiveMMP'
                                                   OR f2.PLACE_ID = '017InvolDisenrollPartd'
                                                   OR f2.PLACE_ID = '033DisenrollDueToIncarceration'
                                                   OR (f2.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND f2.TEMPLATE_ID = '22350X_Dsrl_OoaStsNoVerif_999')
                                                   OR (f2.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND f2.TEMPLATE_ID = '22360X_Dsrl_ConfOoaSts_999')
                                                 )
                                             ) BETWEEN DATEADD(Day, -3, e2.TMG_RECEIPT_DT) AND DATEADD(Day, 3, e2.TMG_RECEIPT_DT)
                                         AND a.EFF_DT = e2.EFF_DT
                                     )
            )
        )
   );

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET DISENROLL_INCARCERATION_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                        WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                          AND b.PLACE_ID = '033DisenrollDueToIncarceration'
                                          AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
   AND a.Trans_Code in ('01','51');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET TR_REPLY_DT = (SELECT MIN(TRRDate) as Clock_Start
                        FROM @{pipeline().parameters.EAMDB}.@{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbTRRData x
                       WHERE x.ClaimNumber = a.MBI
                         AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT <= x.TRRDate
                         AND x.TransReplyCode IN ('121','996','223')
                         AND x.EffectiveDate >= '2020-10-01'
                         AND x.ContractNumber in ('H1352','H6502'))
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a;

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET LIS_RIDER_LETTER_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                               WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                 AND b.PLACE_ID = '023LISRider'
                                 AND a.TR_REPLY_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD in ('121');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET LOSS_OF_LIS_LETTER_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                 WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                   AND b.PLACE_ID = '024LossOfLIS'
                                   AND a.TR_REPLY_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE  a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD in ('223');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET REMOVAL_LIS_PERIOD_LETTER_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                        WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                          AND b.PLACE_ID = '025RemovalOfLISPeriod'
                                          AND a.TR_REPLY_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE  a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD in ('996');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET OEV_AGENT_ASSISTED_LETTER_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                        WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                          AND ((b.PLACE_ID = '032OutboundEnrollVerif' AND (b.TEMPLATE_ID like '3L700A_Enrl_Oev_%'))
                                            OR (b.PLACE_ID = '999OnDemand' AND b.TEMPLATE_ID='3L700X_Enrl_Oev_%'))
                                          AND a.APPLICATION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Code in ('61')
  AND a.CMS_Response_Cd = '011'
  AND a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS';

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
               SET TR_REPLY_DT = (SELECT MIN(TRRDate) as Clock_Start
                                   FROM @{pipeline().parameters.EAMDB}.@{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMOwner}.tbTRRData x
                                  WHERE x.ClaimNumber = a.MBI
                                    AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT <= x.TRRDate
                                    AND x.TransReplyCode IN ('011','016','017','100','117','118','129','132','150','210','212','307','338','339','607','608')
                                    AND a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD = x.TransReplyCode
                                    AND x.TRRDate >= '2020-10-01'
                                    AND x.ContractNumber in ('H1352','H6502'))
FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
  AND a.Trans_Code = '61'
  AND a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD IN ('011','016','017','100','117','118','129','132','150','210','212','307','338','339','607','608');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET MBR_ID_CARD_DT = (SELECT MIN(VNDR_MAIL_DT) as VNDR_MAIL_DT
                           FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.MTM_MBR_ID_CARD_RQST b
                          WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.SUB_ID
                            AND a.TR_REPLY_DT < b.VNDR_MAIL_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Code = '61'
  AND a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
  AND a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD IN ('011','016','017','100','117','118','129','132','150','210','212','307','338','339','607','608');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET CONFIRMED_DISENROLL_PASSIVE_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                          FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                         WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                           AND b.PLACE_ID = '030ConfDisenrollDuePassiveMMP'
                                           AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
  AND a.Trans_Code = '51'
  AND a.CMS_Response_Cd IN ('340');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET INVOLUNTARY_DISENROLL_DT = (SELECT MIN(ECIT_CREATE_DT) as ECIT_CREATE_DT
                                     FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.TCS_MANIFEST_LOG b
                                    WHERE a.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID
                                      AND b.PLACE_ID = '017InvolDisenrollPartD'
                                      AND a.CMS_SUBMISSION_DT < b.ECIT_CREATE_DT)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
  AND a.Trans_Code = '51'
  AND a.CMS_Response_Cd IN ('293');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
	SET WLCM_KIT_MAIL_DT = (SELECT MIN(MAIL_DT) as Clock_Stop
			FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.NXT_PGE_WLCM_KIT_DTL b
			WHERE b.ID_NBR = a.MEMBER_ID
			AND b.DOC_ID LIKE '%WELCOME%'
			AND a.TR_REPLY_DT <= b.MAIL_DT)
FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.Trans_Status = 'Accepted by CMS'
  AND a.Trans_Code = '61'
  AND a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD IN ('011','016','017','100','117','118','129','132','150','210','212','307','338','339','607','608');

UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT
   SET LEP_ADHOC_DT = (SELECT LTR_MLD_DT as Date_Letter_Mailed
                         FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.LEP_DOC_DTL b
                        WHERE a.MBI = b.MBI
                          AND a.FINAL_RESPONSE_DT < b.LTR_MLD_DT
                          AND b.LTR_MLD_DT is not null)
  FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EAMRPTOwner}.ENRL_OPS_RPT a
WHERE a.TRANS_CODE = '73'
  AND a.CMS_RESPONSE_CD = '177'
  AND a.TRANS_STATUS = 'Accepted by CMS';
